articles.title: SpaceX share price drops below stock market debut
articles.difficulty_reason: Short, direct business report with a clear single storyline and mostly B1/B2 vocabulary; low background knowledge needed beyond basic stock-market terms.

articles.title: What Phoenix can teach the world about tackling heat deaths
articles.difficulty_reason: Moderate-length feature with quotes and some cause-and-effect reasoning; useful B1/B2/C1 vocabulary and modest background on climate and public policy.

articles.title: Teen hackers jailed after live streaming cyber attack on TfL
articles.difficulty_reason: Longer, information-dense report with legal and cyber-crime terminology, many named actors and dates, and complex sentences; B2/C1/C2 vocabulary and notable background knowledge required.
